title: Sugar Delight
description: This Minecraft mod adds berries and various sweets made from berries and sugar.
body: This Minecraft mod adds new berries and various sweets made from berries and sugar, as well as a plush toy of the mod's creator. Berry bushes are found in forests and can be harvested with the right mouse button. These bushes can also be planted by holding a berry in your main hand and right-clicking on a grass block.
